title: The Copperhead
writer: Frederick Landis, Augustus Thomas, Charles Maigne
actors: Lionel Barrymore, William P. Carleton, Francis Joyner
plot: Milt Shanks lives a shamed life, hated by his neighbors for having been a traitor to the North in the American Civil War. But Shanks carries with him a secret, one he promised Abraham Lincoln to tell no one.
